---
name: Review Request
about: Request a peer or BA Lead review on a document
title: "[REVIEW] <Document Name> — <Sprint>"
labels: status:In-Review
assignees: unkaidev
---

## Review Request

**Requesting review of:** <!-- Document name and version -->
**Author:** <!-- Your name -->
**Sprint:** <!-- S1–S10 -->
**Deadline:** <!-- Date review is needed by -->

## Document Location

<!-- Link to the file in this repo or the PR -->

## What to Review

<!-- Specific sections, questions, or concerns you want the reviewer to focus on -->

## Review Checklist (for Reviewer)

- [ ] Content is accurate and complete
- [ ] Language is clear and unambiguous
- [ ] Consistent with related documents
- [ ] Follows the correct template/format
- [ ] No open questions left unanswered

## Author Pre-Review Checklist

- [ ] I have spell-checked the document
- [ ] I have self-reviewed against the acceptance criteria
- [ ] I have linked all related requirements
- [ ] I have removed all placeholder/TODO text
